StmtSimple.StatementText: SELECT MIN(t.title) AS movie_title FROM job.keyword AS k, job.movie_info AS mi, job.movie_keyword AS mk, job.title AS t WHERE k.keyword LIKE '%sequel%' AND mi.info IN ('Bulgaria') AND t.production_year > 2010 AND t.id = mi.movie_id AND t.id = mk.movie_id AND mk.movie_id = mi.movie_id AND k.id = mk.keyword_id
